title: 6 Pcs Stainless Steel Measuring Spoons Set, Metal Measure Spoons, Table Spoon Measuring Spoon for Coffee, Teaspoon Scoop, Includes 1/8, 1/4, 1/2, 1 TSP, 1/2 Tbsp, 1 Tbsp, Food Grade
features: Safe and Reliable: Our stainless steel measuring spoons are crafted from food-grade materials, ensuring safe use for all your cooking and baking needs. Say goodbye to plastic and silicone worries
Complete Set for All Needs: This set of metal measuring spoons includes 1/8 tsp, 1/4 tsp, 1/2 tsp, 1 tsp, 1/2 tbsp, and 1 tbsp, providing the perfect measure spoons for any recipe
Engraved for Accuracy: Each tablespoon and teaspoon is engraved with both US and metric measurements, ensuring you never have to guess the right amount. Perfect for precise cooking and baking
Ergonomic Design: Our table spoons measuring spoon set features a comfortable grip and flat design, making it easy to level ingredients and ensuring accurate measurements every time
Easy Maintenance: These stainless steel measuring spoons are dishwasher safe, making cleanup effortless. The included D-ring keeps the set organized and ready for your next culinary adventure
description: Our stainless steel measuring spoons set offers precision with metal measuring spoons for all your culinary needs. This spoon measuring set includes tablespoon and teaspoon measuring spoons, ensuring accurate measurements every time
